0001193125-26-258667.summary: Microsoft director Reid Hoffman will not seek re-election at the 2026 annual shareholder meeting, with no stated disagreement with management.

0001730168-26-000051.summary: Broadcom Inc. announced its Q2 2026 financial results and declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.65 per share payable June 30, 2026.

0000936340-26-000122.summary: DTE Energy will meet with investors on June 8, 2026, and is providing its slide presentation and 2026 operating earnings guidance.

0001104659-26-070571.summary: Antero Midstream Corporation stockholders voted to elect directors, ratify auditors, approve executive compensation, and hold annual advisory votes on executive compensation.

0001628280-26-040364.summary: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (SpaceX) is filing an S-1/A to register 555,555,555 shares of Class A common stock for its initial public offering at an expected price of $135.00 per share.

0001193125-26-259830.summary: Alphabet Inc. issued and sold new Series A and B mandatory convertible preferred stock, which will pay 6.25% dividends and convert to common stock by May 2029.

0001104659-26-071190.summary: Amazon.com, Inc. is offering five series of Canadian dollar-denominated senior unsecured notes with varying interest rates and maturity dates for general corporate purposes.

0000749251-26-000198.summary: Gartner, Inc. held its 2026 Annual Meeting, where stockholders elected directors, approved executive compensation, and ratified KPMG as their accounting firm.

0001783879-26-000068.summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. stockholders re-elected directors, approved executive compensation, and ratified Ernst & Young LLP as their independent auditor at the 2026 Annual Meeting.

0001628280-26-039193.summary: Meta Platforms shareholders re-elected all twelve directors and ratified Ernst & Young as their auditor, while rejecting all twelve shareholder proposals.

0001193125-26-261038.summary: Strategy Inc's shareholders approved changing dividend payments for its Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock (STRC) from monthly to semi-monthly.

0001193125-26-260709.summary: Strategy Inc sold common stock for $181 million, acquired 1,550 bitcoins for $101.3 million, and holds a $1 billion USD reserve.

0001193125-26-260706.summary: Strategy Inc filed additional proxy materials, including an X (Twitter) thread, for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders.

0001193125-26-251680.summary: Strategy Inc filed additional proxy materials related to its 2026 Annual Meeting, including a reply to a social media comment about meeting proposals.

0001193125-26-249768.summary: Strategy Inc sold 801,994 shares of common stock for $128.3 million, sold 32 bitcoins for $2.5 million, and declared cash dividends on its preferred stocks.

0001652044-26-000059.summary: Alphabet Inc. appointed Marsida Saraci as Principal Accounting Officer, effective immediately, granting her restricted stock units as compensation.
